nodes.label: Investing
nodes.description: Autonomous market research, stock scanning, and Robinhood trade execution.

nodes.label: Social / Brand
nodes.description: Instagram, Facebook, YouTube analytics, content creation, and competitor benchmarking.

nodes.label: Espresso Yourself
nodes.description: Mobile coffee business ops: bookings, campaigns, Square analytics, lead generation.

nodes.label: Finance
nodes.description: Personal net worth tracking, budget prep, Plaid bank sync, and monthly reporting.

nodes.label: Infrastructure
nodes.description: RAG knowledge base, web scraping, Notion tools, website builder, and secrets management.

nodes.label: Comms
nodes.description: Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Voice, and Telegram dispatch.

nodes.label: Onboarding
nodes.description: Foundational profiles and context that ground the entire Parker OS.

nodes.label: Future Ventures
nodes.description: Research and validation of new business ideas before committing capital.

nodes.label: Robinhood
nodes.description: Official Robinhood MCP endpoint for agentic trading. Account 749413662.

nodes.label: Notion
nodes.description: Primary data layer. 11+ databases: trading log, leads, watchlist, calendar, todos, and more.

nodes.label: Instagram
nodes.description: Meta Graph API for posts, stories, insights, DMs, and comments.

nodes.label: Facebook
nodes.description: Meta Graph API for Facebook page management and insights.

nodes.label: Google APIs
nodes.description: Gmail, Calendar, and Voice APIs via OAuth 2.0.

nodes.label: Square
nodes.description: EY payment processor. Customer data, invoices, and transaction reports.

nodes.label: Plaid
nodes.description: Bank balance sync via OAuth. Sandbox environment.

nodes.label: Telegram
nodes.description: Notification and approval channel. Trade approvals, briefing delivery, dispatch.

nodes.label: Firecrawl
nodes.description: Web scraping API. Blocks IG/TikTok/YT (social add-on required).

nodes.label: ScrapeCreators
nodes.description: Social media scraping API for IG, TikTok, and YouTube competitor data.

nodes.label: Claude / Anthropic
nodes.description: Claude API for research, signal generation, caption writing, and orchestration.

nodes.label: Gemini
nodes.description: Google Gemini API for RAG vector embeddings.

nodes.label: Quiver Quant
nodes.description: Congressional trade disclosure data scraped via Firecrawl.

nodes.label: Trigger.dev
nodes.description: Cloud task runner for all scheduled automations. Node.js v22.

nodes.label: GitHub Pages
nodes.description: GitHub Pages hosting for the Parker OS system map. Deployed via GitHub Contents API.

nodes.label: Railway Bridge
nodes.description: FastAPI microservice on Railway. Handles Robinhood trade execution, approval queue (24hr TTL), exit signals, and portfolio sync. Agent endpoints: /market-research, /build-model, /earnings-watch, /earnings-review.
nodes.notes: Trade execution unconfirmed — update to autonomous after confirming a real order has been placed.

nodes.label: Early Pre-Market
nodes.description: Overnight news, politician discovery, macro scan, and deep research. Places extended-hours limit orders.

nodes.label: Pre-Market Scan
nodes.description: Politician scan, macro, and deep research. Places extended-hours orders.

nodes.label: Morning Scan
nodes.description: Market open scan. Confidence threshold 6/10 required before executing.

nodes.label: Midday Check
nodes.description: Checks exit signals, runs approved trades, and fresh opportunity scan.

nodes.label: EOD Review
nodes.description: Full daily scan and snapshot to Notion trade log.

nodes.label: After-Hours Scan
nodes.description: After-hours scan with 6/10 threshold. Limit orders only.

nodes.label: Market Scanner
nodes.description: Daily market scan with ML-driven signal generation across watchlist tickers.

nodes.label: Deep Research
nodes.description: Institutional-grade 1/5/10-year thesis with political signal. Used by all scan tasks.

nodes.label: Macro Scanner
nodes.description: Fed, yields, VIX, and economic outlook. Provides macro context for trade signals.

nodes.label: Politician Tracker
nodes.description: Scrapes congressional trade disclosures from Quiver Quantitative.

nodes.label: Trade Executor
nodes.description: Executes buy/sell orders via Robinhood MCP. Real order placement unconfirmed.
nodes.notes: Update to tested/autonomous after confirming a real Robinhood order has gone through.

nodes.label: Stock Research
nodes.description: Quick ticker fundamentals via yfinance, SEC EDGAR, and Finviz.

nodes.label: Watchlist Scan
nodes.description: Ranked buy list from all tickers in the Notion Watchlist DB.

nodes.label: Watchlist Updater
nodes.description: Add/remove tickers from the Notion Watchlist database.

nodes.label: Notion Push
nodes.description: Write scan results and trade signals to Notion.

nodes.label: Portfolio Page
nodes.description: Sync current Robinhood holdings to a Notion portfolio page.

nodes.label: Condense Scans
nodes.description: Compress historical scan data to reduce storage footprint.

nodes.label: Morning Briefing
nodes.description: Daily briefing compilation: market context, EY schedule, calendar, and to-dos.

nodes.label: Weekly Performance
nodes.description: Weekly metrics aggregation across all domains — investing, EY, social.

nodes.label: Content Analytics
nodes.description: Weekly social media performance report from Meta API + ScrapeCreators competitor data.

nodes.label: Content Plan
nodes.description: Auto-generate weekly content plan using Claude and Notion calendar context.

nodes.label: Schedule Post
nodes.description: Schedule and publish content to Instagram and Facebook via Meta API.

nodes.label: Square Weekly Analytics
nodes.description: Weekly EY revenue and transaction analytics from Square, pushed to Notion.

nodes.label: Map Status Sync
nodes.description: Cron at 5:30 AM + 5:30 PM ET. Queries Trigger.dev run history, computes live statuses, pushes runtime_status.json to GitHub Pages so the map reflects actual execution state.

nodes.label: Content Analyzer
nodes.description: Cross-platform engagement analysis: compares posts across Instagram and Facebook.

nodes.label: Competitor Scrape

nodes.description: Fetch recent Instagram posts via Meta Graph API.

nodes.description: Publish new posts to Instagram via Meta Graph API.

nodes.description: Fetch account-level Instagram insights: reach, impressions, followers.

nodes.description: Fetch and read Instagram post comments.

nodes.description: Publish content to Facebook page via Meta Graph API.

nodes.description: Fetch Facebook page-level insights and analytics.

nodes.description: Write social analytics weekly report to Notion Content Analytics DB.

nodes.description: REST wrapper for the ScrapeCreators API used across IG/TikTok/YT tools.

nodes.description: Launch marketing campaigns: draft and send emails to Square customer list.

nodes.description: Sync bank account balances via Plaid API.

nodes.description: Income, expenses, and savings snapshot using Claude for narrative summary.

nodes.description: iPhone → Claude execution bridge via Telegram bot.

nodes.description: Write extracted lead data to Notion Leads DB.

nodes.description: Search Gmail inbox by query, label, or sender.

nodes.description: Summarize inbox using Claude for the morning briefing.

nodes.description: Flag important emails to Notion for follow-up.

nodes.label: Opportunity Research
nodes.description: Validate business ideas with market research using Firecrawl + Claude.

nodes.description: Queries Trigger.dev API for actual run history, computes live statuses, writes runtime_status.json to GitHub Pages. On-demand companion to the scheduled Trigger.dev task.

nodes.label: Dispatch
nodes.description: Send instructions from iPhone via Telegram; Claude executes on the DO droplet with full Parker OS context.

nodes.description: Read, search, draft, send, reply, unsubscribe, label, and flag emails across Parker's three Gmail accounts.

nodes.description: List, create, and sync calendar events across personal and EY calendars, keeping Notion Master Calendar in sync.

nodes.description: Agency-style management of EY and Personal Brand social: analytics, posting, comment/DM management, weekly reporting.

nodes.label: Account Setup
nodes.description: Get Parker live on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube with consistent professional branding before posting.

nodes.label: Competitor Analysis
nodes.description: Produce a standardized clickable PDF deep-dive on a creator Parker models; log to the Competitor Models Notion list.

nodes.label: Analysis Template
nodes.description: Standardized template skeleton for competitor deep-dive PDFs.

nodes.label: Competitor Research
nodes.description: Identify 3 north-star creators Parker models his brand after; build a full competitive map of the niche.

nodes.label: Content Calendar
nodes.description: Keep the content pipeline filled automatically; every Monday a fresh week of ideas lands in Notion for approval.

nodes.label: Content Strategy
nodes.description: Define Parker's content playbook: what he posts, how often, in what format, and why.

nodes.label: EY Operations
nodes.description: Run EY lead gen and scaling: prospect discovery, campaigns, follow-ups, Square reporting, inbound email triage.

nodes.label: EY Profile
nodes.description: Source of truth for all EY communications. Every EY tool/automation reads this before drafting anything.

nodes.label: Trading Windows
nodes.description: Defines the six daily trading windows and the scan-to-order pipeline driving the Robinhood agentic account.

nodes.label: System Map
nodes.description: Maintain the living system map: update node status, add nodes, regenerate, and deploy to GitHub Pages.

nodes.label: Wispr Voice Input
nodes.description: Use Wispr Flow as a system-wide AI mic to dictate text into any focused input field across Mac and iPhone.

nodes.label: RAG Knowledge Base
nodes.description: Turn documents, competitor analyses, research, and workflows into a searchable, grounded knowledge base.

nodes.label: Web Scraping
nodes.description: Pull leads, research, and content sources off the open web via Firecrawl and route them into Notion.

nodes.label: Trigger.dev Automations
nodes.description: Add, test, and deploy scheduled or event-driven TypeScript automations to Trigger.dev.

nodes.label: Website Building
nodes.description: Scaffold, design, preview, and deploy a polished website for any Parker venture.

nodes.label: Website Design Rules
nodes.description: Frontend design standards read before building any page (invoke frontend-design skill, style brief, etc.).

nodes.label: Parker Profile
nodes.description: The master profile: who Parker is, his mission, voice, and goals. Foundational context for the whole system.

nodes.label: Future Ventures
nodes.description: Research, validate, and track business ideas before committing time or capital (Ideas Board live in Notion).

nodes.label: Finance SOP (missing)
nodes.description: No workflow documents the finance tools yet. Gap surfaced by the map: these tools run without a written SOP.

nodes.label: Market Researcher
nodes.description: Claude agent (top-down strategist): reads market regime, favored/avoid sectors, and watchlist add/drop candidates. Runs in Phase 1 of every scan and can only tighten posture.

nodes.label: Model Builder
nodes.description: Claude agent: turns a deep_research thesis into a probability-weighted bull/base/bear model (expected value, 0-100 score, sizing tier). Drives position sizing in Phase 2.

nodes.label: Earnings Reviewer
nodes.description: Claude agent: pre-earnings gap-risk watch + post-earnings results review (yfinance + Claude). Actionable trims route through the same exit guardrails (<=$200 auto / >$200 approval).

nodes.label: Market Research (5:45 AM)
nodes.description: Trigger.dev schedule (5:45 AM ET): calls the bridge Market Researcher before the 6 AM scan and pushes the regime/watchlist read to Notion. Built, not yet deployed.

nodes.label: Earnings Watch (4 PM)
nodes.description: Trigger.dev schedule (4:00 PM ET): pre-earnings gap-risk watch over holdings + watchlist; routes trims through exit guardrails; pushes to Notion. Built, not yet deployed.

nodes.label: Investing Agents
nodes.description: SOP for the investing agent layer: Market Researcher, Model Builder, Earnings Reviewer - roles, prompts, data sources, integration points, and autonomy rules.
